parsed_review.summary: CP00-788 (RP26 Enterprise SaaS Hardening scope/contract foundation, risk C, 150 units, RP26.P00.M00.S01-RP26.P01.M02.S08) passes hardened read-only review. Implementation under packages/enterprise/src is real descriptor-only code (registry/program contract, coverage + descriptor validators, SSO/SCIM descriptor validators with negative-path error accumulation), not stubs. npm test = 3049 pass / 0 fail; model.test.js exercises coverage, runtime-closed descriptor, SSO/SCIM drift rejection, and contract pinning. All 14 commands in command-evidence.json are exit_code 0 with empty stderr (11 print 'validation passed'; git diff --check clean; rp26:enterprise-saas:validate confirms pack/next/unit_count=150). No-write/no-real-data is enforced via ENTERPRISE_SAAS_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION (~40 false runtime/leak flags), validated in validateDescriptor and asserted in tests; command-evidence no_real_data=true, writes_product_state=true->false. Authority boundary holds: descriptor claude_is_final_approval=false, claude packet read_only=true and promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true; Hermes packet emits_runtime_receipt=false with descriptor-only receipt shape (control-plane pattern only, not product runtime). CP178+ hardening satisfied: readiness auth preflight passed with valid JSON, claude-review-result invalid_review_attempts empty, forbidden_review_evidence list encoded. Deliverable and micro-title distributions match the baseline exactly and bind to live plan live_state (CP00-788) and the weighted ledger sha. Contract latest_pack/latest_projection pin CP00-788. Pack is correctly in_progress/review_pending with this review as the gate; the production_ready=true command-evidence claim is supported, and the pack explicitly disclaims runtime and enterprise trust (claims_enterprise_trust=false), so this CP closeout goal is not blocked by the expected human enterprise-trust authority boundary. No P0-P3 findings.
